creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been trying to reproduce this. I've added

BUILD_DEPENDS=  opencl>=0:devel/opencl

to make sure devel/opencl is installed during build time. Then I've built xmrig on 12.2 amd64, 12.2 i386, 13.0 amd64, 14.0 amd64 with poudriere (sandboxed clean environment).

I'm posting the build logs of each build.
